challenge_summary: Core SKUs are mostly aligned with Step 2, but the plan remains cost-feasibility weak in budget enforcement design, observability ingestion control, hidden variable networking costs, and execution realism for a dual-environment rollout.
compact_for_parent: Pass 3 (cost-feasibility) | HIGH | 2 must_fix, 5 should_fix | Key: Budget scope conflicts with hard cap; Telemetry ingest model unbounded

issues.title: Budget design conflicts with the hard EUR1K cap across two environments
issues.description: The plan hardcodes a single amount: 1000 budget while the project deploys both dev and prod. Does not define whether this is one aggregate or per-environment budgets.
issues.artifact_section: Task 9: budget.bicep; Task 10: Parameter Files; Overview
issues.suggested_mitigation: Define explicit budget topology: aggregate budget + separate env budgets with parameterized amounts and names.

issues.title: Telemetry cost assumptions are incompatible with configured ingestion limits
issues.description: Log Analytics dailyQuotaGb: 5 with allLogs/AllMetrics and no sampling, DCR filtering, or per-environment ingestion budgets defined.
issues.suggested_mitigation: Add explicit ingestion guardrails: per-env daily caps, sampling targets, DCR filtering. Include p50/p90 observability cost bands.

issues.title: Private networking variable meters are not modeled as operational cost guardrails
issues.suggested_mitigation: Add explicit variable networking assumptions and alerts by meter category (DNS, PE, egress).

issues.title: Dev cost-optimization strategy is not executable from implementation tasks
issues.suggested_mitigation: Add concrete dev FinOps controls: scheduled deploy/destroy, lower dev log retention/quotas.

issues.title: Cost BOM reconciliation is incomplete despite mostly consistent core SKUs
issues.suggested_mitigation: Create a single BOM table mapping every deployed item per environment to a cost line item.

issues.title: Implementation duration estimate is optimistic for cost-safe delivery
issues.suggested_mitigation: Re-baseline effort with explicit FinOps validation tasks and contingency buffer.

issues.title: No explicit reaction plan for budget variance against expected run-rate
issues.suggested_mitigation: Add a cost variance playbook with trigger levels (+15%, +30%) and pre-approved actions.

issues.title: Post-launch right-sizing and reservation review checkpoint is missing
issues.suggested_mitigation: Add a 30/60/90-day FinOps checkpoint with CPU, DTU, and cost-per-order KPIs.
